videos.title: How to Float and Overcome Fear of Water - Absolute Beginners
videos.description: Building water confidence for absolute beginners including floating techniques, body relaxation, and gradual depth progression.

videos.title: Freestyle Technique - Body Position, Catch and Pull
videos.description: Complete freestyle tutorial covering head position, high elbow catch, hip rotation, and efficient flutter kick technique.

videos.title: Freestyle Drills to Improve Your Stroke - Catch-Up, Fingertip Drag
videos.description: Essential freestyle drills including catch-up drill, fingertip drag, fist drill, and single arm freestyle for stroke improvement.

videos.title: Breathing in Swimming - How to Breathe Without Panicking
videos.description: Rhythmic breathing technique, continuous exhale underwater, bilateral breathing, and managing breathing anxiety for swimmers.

videos.title: Backstroke Technique for Beginners - Body Position and Kick
videos.description: How to swim backstroke with proper body position, arm entry, hip rotation, and steady flutter kick on your back.

videos.title: Breaststroke Tutorial - Timing, Kick, and Glide
videos.description: Breaststroke pull-breathe-kick-glide timing, proper whip kick technique, and maintaining streamline during the glide phase.

videos.title: Butterfly Stroke Tutorial - Body Undulation and Arm Recovery
videos.description: How to swim butterfly with proper body undulation, two-kick timing, arm recovery over water, and breathing rhythm.

videos.title: Flip Turn Tutorial - How to Do a Flip Turn in Swimming
videos.description: Step-by-step flip turn technique including approach, somersault, wall push-off, streamline, and breakout for freestyle and backstroke.

videos.title: Swimming Endurance - How to Swim Without Getting Tired
videos.description: Building swimming endurance through pacing, stroke efficiency, breathing patterns, and CSS training methodology.

videos.title: Open Water Swimming Tips - Sighting, Drafting, and Navigation
videos.description: Open water swimming techniques including crocodile sighting, drafting behind other swimmers, and swimming straight without lanes.

videos.title: Underwater Dolphin Kick - Streamline and Breakout
videos.description: Streamline body position, underwater dolphin kick technique off walls and starts, and optimal breakout timing.

videos.title: Swimming for Kids - Learn to Swim Fun Games and Drills
videos.description: Age-appropriate swimming activities for children including water confidence games, kicking drills, and progressive stroke introduction.

videos.title: Swim Workout Structure - How to Plan Your Pool Session
videos.description: How to structure a swim workout with warm-up, drill sets, main set, kick sets, and cool-down for different fitness levels.

videos.title: Dryland Training for Swimmers - Core and Shoulder Exercises
videos.description: Out-of-pool exercises for swim-specific strength including resistance band pulls, core stability, rotator cuff work, and ankle flexibility.

videos.title: Dive Start and Block Start Technique for Racing
videos.description: Racing dive technique from blocks including track start, entry angle, streamline breakout, and reaction time training.

videos.title: Swimming Kaise Seekhe - Beginners Ke Liye (Hindi)
videos.description: Hindi swimming tutorial for absolute beginners covering water confidence, floating, and basic freestyle stroke technique.

videos.title: Pool Etiquette - Lane Swimming Rules and Tips
videos.description: Pool etiquette basics including choosing the right lane speed, circle swimming, passing protocol, and resting at the wall.

videos.title: Breaststroke Kick Fix - Common Whip Kick Mistakes
videos.description: Fixing common breaststroke kick problems including scissor kick, asymmetric kick, and not finishing with feet together.
